name: sux
description: Marketplace for sux: ONE universal OAuth-gated connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) whose front-door verbs cover web/data/compute AND your personal namespaces (vault_/mail_/files_/cal_/contact_ + recall + the `fn` escape) — plus the sux-life memory skill. The per-domain connectors are retired into the single front door; their routes stay dormant on the Worker.

plugins.name: sux-router
plugins.description: The one sux connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) + the `sux` routing skill. A single OAuth-gated front door: web search, scraping/rendering, papers, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch composition — AND your personal vault/mail/files reached through `vault_`/`mail_`/`files_` verbs (+ `recall`, + the `fn` escape hatch). One install, one connector, everything behind it. OAuth in-browser on first connect.

plugins.name: sux-life
plugins.description: The digital-life MEMORY layer — a skill (no separate connector) that turns the one sux connector into a second brain: capture, remember durable facts/people/decisions, recall across notes + mail + files + web with citations, triage the inbox, consolidate into a linked graph. Git is the undo. Rides on sux-router's front door.
